title: Toward an Optimized Workflow for Middle-Down Proteomics.
author: Cristobal A Marino F Post H van den Toorn HW Mohammed S Heck AJ
content: S-EPMC5362747 PMC5362747 Toward an Optimized Workflow for Middle-Down Proteomics. Mass spectrometry (MS)-based proteomics workflows can crudely be classified into two distinct regimes, targeting either relatively small peptides (i.e., 0.7 kDa < M<sub>w</sub> < 3.0 kDa) or small to medium sized
